description: The main navigation bar of the application, containing the company logo (an image), a link to the settings and a special link to log out.

title: Tasks List
description: Una lista di controllo per tracciare le attività di sviluppo del team. Ogni riga rappresenta una task e contiene un elemento interattivo (un link di dettaglio, un bottone di completamento o un'icona di eliminazione).

title: Newsletter Subscription
description: A subscription box to receive platform updates. It contains an email input field, a privacy policy acceptance checkbox, and a confirmation button.

title: Notification Preferences
description: A configuration panel within the user settings to manage notification reception. It contains a checkbox for email, one for push messages, and a button to save changes.
templateHTML: System Notifications
